description_long: This bungalow features a modern, angular design with a flat roof and a mix of dark and light exterior materials. The front facade includes a driveway, a garage, and a recessed entryway, with a small landscaped area adjacent to the entrance. The side and rear views reveal a large, stepped backyard with alternating green and paved sections, likely intended for both recreation and visual appeal. The structure is primarily composed of concrete, glass, and wood, with large windows and open spaces suggesting a focus on natural light and indoor-outdoor connectivity. The roofline is flat and multi-leveled, contributing to the contemporary architectural style. The overall layout is elongated, with the main living spaces set back from the street and extensive landscaping in the rear.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a mix of dark and light materials, large windows, and a stepped backyard featuring alternating green and paved sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and a small landscaped area adjacent to the street.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the extensive stepped backyard with green and paved sections.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the large, terraced backyard with alternating green and paved strips, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the full length of the stepped backyard and the modern, angular lines of the building.
